speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Review — An achievement

cueCard.topic: Describe an achievement you are proud of.
bullets: how long you worked on it
when it was completed or published
and explain why you are proud of it

speaking.sampleAnswer: I have already finished my first book. I have worked on it since I was in university, about two years. It has just been published last month. I am proud of it because it took a lot of hard work.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 3: Discussing rules and consequences
questions: What will happen if people don't follow traffic rules?
If the government makes stricter regulations, will safety improve?
What will you do if you see someone breaking a rule?
speaking.sampleAnswer: If people don't follow traffic rules, there will be more accidents. If the government makes stricter regulations, safety will probably improve. If I see someone breaking a rule, I will remind them politely.
